source_pr.title: planner: simplify the syntax of creating bindings
source_pr.body:

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

Issue Number: close #48876

Problem Summary: planner: simplify the syntax of creating bindings

### What changed and how does it work?

planner: simplify the syntax of creating bindings

See https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/48876

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is a deterministic feature/change to the SQL grammar and bindinfo tests: it adds a simplified `CREATE [GLOBAL] BINDING USING <stmt>` syntax in the parser (`parser.y` regenerated `parser.go`) and adds unit test coverage in `bind_test.go`. The captured evidence (`race = "on"`) is just a test config flag, not a flaky failure signature, so we keep a conservative fallback classification.
fix_pattern: Extend parser grammar to accept simplified `CREATE [GLOBAL] BINDING USING <BindableStmt>` syntax (regenerate parser) and add bindinfo unit tests validating the new binding creation workflow.
analysis:
PR title: planner: simplify the syntax of creating bindings

Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (4): pkg/bindinfo/tests/BUILD.bazel, pkg/bindinfo/tests/bind_test.go, pkg/parser/parser.go, pkg/parser/parser.y
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
